name: Solenne Benahavís
description: A hillside project in Benahavís with layered terraces, open views and a calm Mediterranean feel.
seoDescription: Explore Solenne Benahavís, a hillside new development with layered terraces and open Mediterranean views.
twitterDescription: A Benahavís hillside project with layered terraces, privacy and open Mediterranean views.

contact.whatsappMessage: Hello Nueva Living, I would like to speak with an advisor about Solenne Benahavís.

privateViewing.alt: Solenne private terrace atmosphere with pool and evening light

overview.headlineHtml: Hillside homes with space and open views
copy: Solenne is for buyers who want the privacy and views of Benahavís while staying close to Marbella, golf and the coast.
The homes are planned around generous terraces, a calm arrival and outdoor living that feels like a natural part of each home.
metrics: Layered terraces and a calm arrival
Buyers looking for privacy and views
Private PDF and master plan by request

why.headlineHtml: Why Solenne may be right for you
why.copy: Solenne suits buyers who want a well-designed hillside home with privacy, open views and a quieter pace above the coast.
points: Buyers seeking Benahavís privacy, views and a quieter daily rhythm.
A layered hillside design with a calmer, more private arrival than a typical apartment project.
Benahavís combines privacy, golf access, mountain scenery and proximity to Marbella.
The best options depend on direction, terrace size and which homes are still available.

copy: Horizontal levels, planting and outdoor rooms help the buildings sit more naturally into the hillside.
The design focuses on shade, privacy, a calm arrival and good views without feeling overdone.
highlights: Layered terrace planning with generous exterior living space.
Mediterranean planting around the entrance and shared spaces.
Large windows positioned for light and views.
Boutique scale with a private residential feel.

residences.copy: Ask us for the latest home types, sizes and availability. Every option is designed around generous terraces and hillside privacy.

items.name: Garden Residences
features: Private exterior space with direct garden relationship.

items.name: Terrace Apartments
features: Elevated daily living with broad glazing.
Terraces arranged for dining and lounge use.
Strong balance of privacy and convenience.

items.name: Penthouses
features: Large terraces for entertaining and long-stay use.
Selected units may include pool or solarium options.

privateViewing.copy: Explore the setting, arrival and main living spaces before asking for the full project information.
insights: A calm hillside approach with layered landscape and privacy.
Layered terraces, clean horizontal lines and large windows facing the views.
Designed for buyers who value privacy, outdoor space and a quiet setting.
Request current material to confirm unit mix and status.

lifestyle.copy: Life here is quiet but connected, with mountain light, golf and privacy, plus an easy drive to Marbella and the coast.
panels: The setting feels peaceful while still working well for year-round living.
Outdoor space, views and landscaping create a calm place to spend time.
Marbella, Puerto Banús and coastal services remain within reach for dining, shopping and schools.

location.copy: Benahavís is known for private communities, golf and elevated residential areas. It suits buyers who want the coast nearby without living in the middle of it.

investment.copy: Long-term appeal depends on the number of homes, direction, views, developer quality and demand in Benahavís. No return is assumed or promised.
cards: The best directions and terraces can be reserved early.
The latest documents confirm availability, payment terms and which homes are released.
Privacy, views and outdoor space remain important to buyers in Benahavís.
The project suits buyers who want to enjoy the home now and own it for the long term.

trustDossier.copy: Before you shortlist, we check the developer information, reservation status, specifications and how each home differs.
cards: We check the project documents against the latest release before recommending a home.
We explain the reservation, payment schedule and legal support before you commit.
We confirm the expected delivery and available warranty information.
We compare the project with what you actually need, rather than treating it as a generic listing.

items: Receive the brochure, master plan and current availability.
Review home types, direction, terrace size and which option suits you.
Arrange a guided preview once preferred options are identified.
Check the reservation terms and developer documents before you proceed.

projectFile.copy: Ask us for the latest prices, availability, plans and technical information.
documents: Full site layout and home types

availability.copy: We confirm current availability, reservation status and prices before arranging a viewing.

enquiry.copy: Ask for current availability, floorplans or a private viewing. We will send the information that is relevant to you.
enquiry.message: I would like to receive the latest information for Solenne Benahavís, including current availability, master plan, floorplans and viewing options.
enquiry.sentMessage: Thank you. We have received your Solenne enquiry and will be in touch.
